items.title: The Pentagon formally labels Anthropic a supply-chain risk
items.summary: After weeks of failed negotiations, public ultimatums, and lawsuit threats, the Defense Department has formally labeled Anthropic a "supply-chain risk," escalating its fight with the AI company over their acceptable use policies and potentially bringing their fight to court. The decision, first reported by The Wall Street Journal on Thursday, citing one source familiar, will […]

items.title: FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling
items.summary: As GPU throughput outpaces memory bandwidth, kernels must evolve. We introduce FlashAttention-4, featuring new pipelining for maximum overlap, 2-CTA MMA modes to reduce shared memory traffic, and a hardware-software hybrid approach to softmax exponentials.
